body1: ABTConsulting (PTY) Ltd is a Johannesburg-registered, Cape Town-based business management consultancy. We help small and medium enterprises navigate complexity: from cloud adoption and data strategy to marketing, public relations, and compliance.
body2: Our team combines deep local knowledge with international best practices to deliver solutions that are practical, scalable, and aligned with your goals. We don't do one-size-fits-all. Every engagement is tailored to your unique business context.
